title: Travelling in Nepal - Questions and Answers
body:
O.P.
Just making this thread because I couldn't find a recent one.
I'll be in nepal kathmandu for 1 month for a university placement (35 hours week) so outside that I'm planning to see kathmandu as much as possible and weekends go out into the regional areas (short treks – pokhora). We will skip going to chitwan.
At the moment in Thamel in a hotel but will be with my host family for the month from tomorrow.
What are some recommendation places/restaurants/lounges and any tips on nepal.
